Meghan Fenzel, Esq., JASSY VICK CAROLAN LLP, (310) 870-7048, for Defendant.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-25-2023 Continued To Aug-09-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Its Second Amended Complaint For Damages Arising From Defendants Intentional Interference With Contractual Relations
Off Calendar May-02-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ALLAN J. BESBRIS, Esq. of Law Offices of Allan J. Besbris (Tel: 415-855-5000) for plaintiff;
Atty. MEGHAN FENZEL, Esq. of Jassy Vick Carolan LLP (Tel: 310-870-7048) for defendants KGO Television, Inc. and Diane Laster-Heathman.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF AKA MARKETING LLC's Motion For Leave To File Its Second Amended Complaint For Damages Arising From Defendants Intentional Interference With Contractual Relations.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for leave to file it's [sic] second amended complaint for damages arising from defendants' intentional interference with contractual relations" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
